summary: Matched additional stage/ground code for grKraid and grShrineRoute by replacing several placeholder stubs and UNK prototypes with typed C implementations, adding missing stage data/callback tables, refining Ground union variants, and updating symbols for a newly named Shrine Route function and split data object.
what_changed: Implemented grKraid_801FE1EC, setting a ground object's JObj scale from Ground_801C0498() and marking gp->x11_flags.b012.

Implemented grKraid_801FE2D0, using HSD_PadMasterStatus[1].trigger & PAD_BUTTON_A to cycle a static animation/effect request index, print an OSReport message, and call grAnime_801C8138 with the ground object's map_id.
Implemented grKraid_801FF0E0 as bool grKraid_801FF0E0(Ground_GObj*, int flag), comparing gp->gv.kraid2.xC against either 0x9E or 0x82 and calling ftLib_80086C9C(0xC, 0x0) when the condition passes.
Added static int grKr_804D6A0C and included ft/ftlib.h plus baselib/controller.h in grkraid.c to support the new Kraid implementations.
Added grKraid_GroundVars2 to src/melee/gr/types.h and exposed it in the Ground union as gv.kraid2, with xC at gp+D0 typed as s32.
Added grShrineroute_GroundVars to src/melee/gr/types.h and exposed it in the Ground union as gv.shrineroute, including fields xC8, xCA, and xCC.
Defined grSh_Route_803E58E0 as an s16[8] map/collision-related ID array in grshrineroute.c.
Defined grSh_Route_803E58F0 as a 7-entry StageCallbacks table for Shrine Route ground object callback dispatch.
Defined grSh_Route_803E5988 as the Shrine Route StageData object, referencing /GrNSr.dat and existing grShrineRoute initialization/dynamics callbacks.

Implemented grShrineRoute_802088C0 to create a ground GObj via Ground_801C14D0, wire callbacks from grSh_Route_803E58F0, set up GX link with grDisplay_801C5DB0, attach a proc with HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54 when present, and OSReport on creation failure.
Renamed and implemented the formerly anonymous fn_80208F14 as bool grShrineRoute_80208F14(void), checking Ground_801C2BA4(4), the retrieved Ground pointer, and shrine-route fields xCA and xCC.
Implemented grShrineRoute_8020B0AC as a loop over the first 7 entries of grSh_Route_803E58E0 calling mpLib_800575B0.
Updated grshrineroute.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to typed signatures for grShrineRoute_802088C0, grShrineRoute_80208F14, grShrineRoute_8020B020, and grShrineRoute_8020B0AC.
Updated grkraid.h prototype for grKraid_801FF0E0 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to bool grKraid_801FF0E0(Ground_GObj*, int flag).
Updated symbols.txt to rename fn_80208F14 to grShrineRoute_80208F14 and to split grSh_Route_803E5988 from size 0x58 into a 0x30 object plus a new grSh_Route_803E59BC string object.
smart_moves: Converted anonymous or placeholder functions only where the surrounding code and data usage justified concrete names and signatures, keeping unrelated stubs untouched.
Modeled stage-specific Ground data as separate union variants, grKraid_GroundVars2 and grShrineroute_GroundVars, instead of forcing fields into an existing layout with incompatible types.
Matched Shrine Route object creation through the generic StageCallbacks pattern, preserving callback0/callback2/callback3 conditional dispatch and expected GX/proc setup order.
Used real data declarations for StageCallbacks and StageData, which also clarified the symbols.txt object boundary for grSh_Route_803E5988 and the following string data.
Kept debug/error OSReport strings in the implemented functions, which can be important for matching string references and instruction ordering.
Chose typed return values such as bool and HSD_GObj* in headers, improving future call-site matching and reducing reliance on UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.
decomp_lessons: For stage files, matching one function may require first materializing the stage callback table and StageData object so function pointer references and data boundaries line up.

When a Ground union field is accessed at the same offset with a different semantic type in another function, adding a second stage-specific GroundVars struct can be cleaner than overloading the original struct.
Renaming fn_* symbols should be synchronized across symbols.txt, source definitions, and headers once a function is identified as a stage-local gr* routine.
Data object sizes in symbols.txt may need revision when decompiled C splits an object and adjacent string/data symbols become visible.
Controller/debug test hooks can appear in stage code; matching them may require including baselib/controller.h and preserving exact pad index, trigger mask, wraparound bounds, and OSReport text.
Boolean matching may benefit from preserving explicit comparisons and temporary variables, as in grKraid_801FF0E0's threshold selection and comp variable.
naming_conventions: Stage functions use the grStageName_Address convention, e.g. grKraid_801FF0E0 and grShrineRoute_80208F14.
Anonymous fn_80208F14 was promoted to grShrineRoute_80208F14 after being identified as a Shrine Route function.
Stage data symbols keep abbreviated file prefixes and address suffixes, e.g. grSh_Route_803E58F0 and grSh_Route_803E5988.
Stage-specific Ground union members use lowercase stage names, e.g. gv.kraid2 and gv.shrineroute.
New ground variable structs follow existing project style with stage-qualified names such as grKraid_GroundVars2 and grShrineroute_GroundVars.
Header prototypes retain address comments while replacing UNK signatures with concrete C types.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Declared grSh_Route_803E58E0 as s16[8] and iterated with u32 i < 7 in grShrineRoute_8020B0AC, matching the apparent use of seven active entries despite an eight-element table.
Used nested null checks in grShrineRoute_80208F14 rather than collapsing conditions, likely preserving the control-flow shape around Ground_801C2BA4, GET_GROUND, xCA, and xCC.
In grKraid_801FE1EC, assigned scale.x = scale.y = scale.z = Ground_801C0498() before HSD_JObjSetScale, matching a uniform Vec3 scale pattern.
In grKraid_801FE2D0, preserved a static global counter with increment, wrap at > 6, debug print, and grAnime_801C8138 call using gp->map_id.
In grKraid_801FF0E0, used a local threshold selected by flag == 1 and an explicit bool comp before triggering ftLib_80086C9C.
For grShrineRoute_802088C0, callback wiring order is significant: clear x8/xC callbacks, set GX link, assign x1C_callback from callback3, invoke callback0, then register callback2 as a GObj proc.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
The PR body/human text excerpt was empty, so intent beyond the title and diff is inferred from changed code only.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that continue matching grShrineRoute_80208F70 or other remaining Shrine Route stubs.
Find later PRs that refine grKraid_GroundVars2 or merge it with another Kraid ground variable layout.
Search for other PRs that split StageData objects from adjacent strings in config/GALE01/symbols.txt.
Search for grShrineRoute_8020B020 implementation to verify the typed prototype added here.
Search for uses of grShrineRoute_80208F14 to confirm the renamed symbol's role in Shrine Route behavior.
